semantics: texture pointer, width, height, max index, stride
notes: Reads data.tex and stores texsize_x_mm=width-1 / texsize_y_mm=height-1.
Mesh3Dv2 payload decodes int16 texcoords with scale 4/32767; legacy Mesh3D can supply arbitrary fVec2.
In ortho path u/v are affine in screen space after barycentric normalization.

semantics: T *= vertex w / aera; cw_p interpolates vertex w / aera
notes: Fixed affine increments do not exactly match this unless perspective is disabled or cw_p is effectively constant.

semantics: T.x *= texture width; T.y *= texture height
edge_behavior: coordinates can reach width/height or beyond
notes: TGX uses width, not width-1, when converting normalized coordinates to texture pixel units.
Direct candidate target for fixed-point affine fast path.

semantics: tx/ty recomputed from C1/C2/C3 at start x
notes: A fixed path must preserve per-scanline start behavior and clipping-start bx.
Perspective path is not a simple fixed linear coordinate in final sampled xx/yy.

per_pixel_work: reciprocal and two multiplies per sampled pixel
notes: Large part of cost; fixed affine candidate is unsafe here unless restricted.
Negative coordinates use floor semantics, so ax/ay stay in [0,1).

semantics: min/max x/y chosen by shaderclip or bitmask
edge_behavior: clamp arbitrary size; wrap assumes power of two
notes: Wrap uses & texsize_mm, so only correct for power-of-two textures.

per_pixel_work: one address calculation and one texel load
notes: Nearest uses C++ truncation toward zero, not floor. Negative fractional values behave differently from bilinear.

semantics: texture sample multiplied by Gouraud/flat light/color factors
notes: Coordinate fast path must feed the same or visually equivalent sampled color into existing modulation.

semantics: tx += dtx; ty += dty; cw_p += dw_p if perspective
notes: Fixed increments only map directly to ortho/affine or a deliberately approximate perspective path.
Quality selects nearest or bilinear instantiation.
Wrap path assumes power-of-two dimensions.
Candidate fixed floor must match this for exactness.
Fixed coordinate candidates can feed equivalent 8-bit weights if fractional precision is chosen carefully.

semantics: T clipped linearly during triangle clipping
notes: Clipped triangles can create arbitrary fractional T values.
Mesh3Dv2 allows values roughly in [-4,4].

semantics: separate 2D bilinear path subtracts 0.5 before sampling
notes: This investigation targets 3D shader texture path; 2D texture shader semantics differ.
